UW-13  LIGAMENT EFFICIENCY. (a) When a shell or head contains multiple openings, the ligament efficiency between adjacent openings shall be calculated and compared to the joint efficiency from UW-12. The lesser value shall govern. (b) The ligament efficiency shall be computed as the ratio of the minimum ligament width to the pitch between openings. (c) When the ligament efficiency is less than the joint efficiency, the shell thickness required by UG-27 shall be increased accordingly. For opening reinforcement, see UG-37 and UG-38. Refer to UG-36 for general opening requirements.
